recommendations.title: Anne of Green Gables
recommendations.overview: A retelling of L.M. Montgomery's story of Anne Shirley, an orphan who is accidentally sent to a couple looking to adopt a boy instead.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: First Girl I Loved
recommendations.overview: Seventeen-year-old Anne just fell in love with Sasha, the most popular girl at her L.A. public high school. But when Anne tells her best friend, Clifton—who has always harbored a secret crush on her—he does his best to get in the way.

recommendations.title: A Princess for Christmas
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Romance, Drama
recommendations.overview: After her sister and brother-in-law's tragic deaths, an American woman who is the guardian for her young niece and nephew is invited to a royal European castle for Christmas by her late brother-in-law's father, the Duke of Castlebury. Feeling out of

recommendations.title: Amour
recommendations.overview: Georges and Anne are in their eighties. They are cultivated, retired music teachers. Their daughter, who is also a musician, lives abroad with her family. One day, Anne has a stroke, and the couple's bond of love is severely tested.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.

recommendations.title: Nostalgic Christmas
recommendations.overview: When Anne helps her father close the family's toy store, what she finds will help inspire an entire town that is need of some Christmas cheer.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.
